nodes.narrative: You stand before a heavy, rusted iron door leading into the goblin caves. The hinges look weak.

choices.description: Kick the door down with brute force.
Carefully pick the lock on the door.
Walk away. Adventuring is too scary.

nodes.narrative: SMASH! The door flies open, crushing a goblin that was standing behind it. You enter the cave victoriously.
Ouch! You stub your toe on the iron door. The door doesn't budge. Now they know you are here.
CLICK. You masterfully unlock the door and slip inside unnoticed. Stealth is your middle name.
SNAP. Your lockpick breaks in the keyhole. You are locked out.
You decide adventuring isn't for you and go home to become a simple turnip farmer. The end.
